AC: 9
STR: +8
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
AC: 9
STR: +8
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Great Divide
NPC Name
Gorul Longshanks


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Great Divide


Uploaded December 27th, 2024 by iventheassassin

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
How much would you pay for these and why?
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2003 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759513593
221 posts
My 55 Druid has been killing this guy for over a week, killed him about 9 times and finally had the leggings drop. The AC is nice and the Strength is nice but my question is how much would you be willing to pay for these and why? Buy it for the AC or for the Strength and for how much? Only 1 other in the bazaar on MT and it's selling for 980 pp.

# Mar 05 2003 at 2:52 PM Rating: Decent

29 posts

▲ Page top
pretty cheap
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2002 at 1:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254303216
6 posts
i bought a pair for 50pp on firiona vie today. great deal for me and nice leggings for my lvl.

Embra
Rouge of the 24th assination.
▲ Page top
Beastlords
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 7:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248624064
1 post
Beastlords can now use these legs. Bought a pair in Bazaar for 100pp. nice deal for me :).
▲ Page top
Doable with Small Group around L 40
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2002 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759303724
6 posts
He can be done with very little pain by a group in low 40's high 30's. We had a wolf-formed L 45 Druid, who was doing the snare, and Dotting (Bug Dotting) to keep aggro. Other Druid was L 38, also Wolf-Formed and nuking with Careless Lightning, Wizzie was nuking with fire dd for about 250. And I (L 38 Pally) was chasing behind him like a little rat terrier with my arbitor's. He has about 6k HP, went down in about 8 minutes.
Done it two times and counting, have two shields to show for the effort so far. Lost about 300 hp total in both attempts.

Xita Frostglade
Ethereal Sisterhood
Saryn
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2002 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1626049033209
51 posts
Hehe, either the guy I bought em off of didn't know any better or they go much cheaper now but I bought them for 300pp on Tunare. Sent a tell as soon as he auctioned, str items are mucho importante for erud sk's :)
▲ Page top
black ice legs
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 6:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253816340
2 posts
Hey, ive been looking for str legs on Nife, all i can say is they are better than black ice. by far less weight, but a lil bit less AC. as good as mith under lvl 35. i hear they look goofy though.

beastlords cannot wear these
▲ Page top
worth price
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 2:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591763858409
34 posts
Worth the price, consider u hvae to be 55+ to work on longshanks and its his rare drop. Not too rare i hear but 8str is nice on legs and not too shabby AC. nice Monk legs after 45 or so, 3 WT isnt bad at that lvl. Had a pair, getting another pair)
▲ Page top
RE: worth price
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2002 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765751980
49 posts
55+? Naaah, I put my short gnomie leg out. He fell over it and he died. Seriously tho. I was a lvl 48 necro by then when i killed him. Had my lvl 45 ranger friend with me. We killed him pretty easy, got the leggings :)
▲ Page top
how u guys get the money for these?
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 7:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758417092
16 posts
how can one get the money for one of these suckers? BTW im lvl 21 so its kinda hard, im in Warslik, but, is there some special skill like tailoring o somethin that could give me a boost in money? I got all my armour by trading, but never had to deal with buying from scratch if u kno what i meen
▲ Page top
Got em in a Trade
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 4:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762762677
3 posts
Traded a Spirit Tome straight up for some of these. Im really to finishing quest for staff of the wheel, and i had a stein of moggok already, so i figured what the hell, didnt need the tome, and my warrior could use the legs. I admit this is a great monk item, (weight is great) but i dont play as a monk, so..? Happy with the trade. 8str is nice for that slot for what i got em for.


Lysandus Loxinius
High Elf Wizard of Tunare
Domain of Rodcet Nife

Are these things really worth 2,750 pp? I have them in my Necros backpack and I can't believe they would be worth that much.
▲ Page top
2 in a row :P
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 6:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just yesterday these dropped, was with 59necro and a 44warrior fear kiting (for faction and exp).A pair of these dropped and necro won roll...i was so disappointed ;(...and then after i gave them to him we saw the same giant and he dropped the ice weave again :). i got a 77 and warrior got a 44. I was so happy :). Just thought i would share story, I guess the moral would be don't lose hope hehe. (i know seems kinda corny) Falinx, Feninn Ro, 49 Knight of Greenmist
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 10:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My monk now has 143str thanks to these. He's at 16weight, using a KD and fists, and has 4.0wt Iksar Scaled Gloves as well as two 1.0wt wristbands and a belt that weighs 1.0wt
GORUL
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 10:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
its GORUL, not GORGUL
▲ Page top
Not too hard a kill
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 5:56 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Killed this guy earlier. Pretty easily with me, a lvl 52 druid, and two palies lvl 51 and 50 i believe they were. After a bit of straight meleeing / healing I snared, debuffed and doted him then ran around (also sat to med to make sure he didn't like me) while they beat on him while he was running. He was pretty easy once we started doing that.

Does anyone have any idea on how his spawning works (how often, placeholders or anything)? Or about how rare the ice weave legs are?
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 11:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It's the highest str monk leggings! AC 9 and str 8 for a monk is too good

▲ Page top
Gorul Longshanks
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2001 at 11:16 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Giants name is Gorul Longshanks. He is always 47th with lots ( all SoV mobs have lots) of hp. Just a little bit easier than Gorgul Paclock in BW. Common drop is the Runebranded Stone Buckler AC15 str 5 sv dis mag poison 10. WAR SHD ROG SHM and large races only. Nice shield if it was smaller races too.
▲ Page top
Looks
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2001 at 3:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248099055
8 posts
For those of us that are concerned about the looks(as well as the functionality, mind you)

Unfortunately to say, it looks like normal every day leather.

runebranded stone buckler
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2001 at 6:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750069622
Scholar
88 posts
correction on the name of the shield... it was called a runebranded stone buckler. (-=
▲ Page top
Gorgul Longshanks
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2000 at 10:15 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750069622
Scholar
88 posts
Gorgul Longshanks is a named giant with HUGE hp (think MG patriarch here) Took me an hour to kite him (started at 50 mana) He did not drop the legs. Instead dropped a runebranded dark shield (BAR, TRO, OGR only SHD, WAR, SHA only) ac 15 STR+5 sv magic poison and disease +10. It's an ok shield.. Definatley not as good as his rare drop (=
▲ Page top
RE: Gorgul Longshanks
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 1:41 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Kazooie is correct. Gorgul has astronomical hps for his lvl AND hits quite hard. Conned yellow to lvl 46, and took 20 mins for a 49 druid, 46 ranger, 45 pally and 45 druid to take him down with lots of medding for heals. Dropped the leggings. Look like mammoth hide leggings, solid black. Don't know his spawn rate (random?) but he popped on tracking again immediately. Needless to say, we were in no shape to tackle him again.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 16 2000 at 4:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)

# Dec 16 2000 at 4:23 PM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
Anonymous
It drops off a named giant named Gorgul, close to the giant fort. the Wt is 3

#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 16 2000 at 3:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My idiot friend looted these from a named frost giant in Great Divide at giant fort (sorry, can't remember his name) and looted them into his fletchingkit so he could try them on and see what they look like. Needless to say he hit the combine button and POOF! Not to name names or anything.......but he's on the Nameless server and goes by the name ..........
